layout.description: Dense, data-focused. Every pixel utilized. Sharp edges, minimal soft shadows.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, flat backgrounds, primary color for main CTA. On hover: lighter hue. data-testid required.
components.cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px subtle border (#27272A), no shadow. On hover: slight lift, border color darkens.
components.header: Solid Background (#0A0A0A) with hard bottom border. Sticky top z-50.
components.map: Interactive map container should take full width/height of its grid area. Use dark tile layer. Route should be a vibrant neon color (Volt Blue).
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts for elevation and pace. Remove grid lines for a cleaner look. Use vibrant primary colors for chart lines with a subtle gradient fill below.
components.navigation: Top navigation or side rail. Must have visible navigation bar, logo + links + CTA. Mobile uses hamburger menu.

motion.hover: Subtle background color shifts and border highlights.
motion.metrics_load: Number counter animation or staggered fade-in for data points.

images.description: Abstract blue topographic map with glowing lines, ideal for landing page hero or empty map state background.
Person running on a path through a forest. Good for profile header, auth screen background, or run history empty state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Bebas Neue and Manrope from Google Fonts in the layout or index file.
Install Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, modern icons.
Implement an interactive map (e.g., using react-leaflet, leaflet) for the Route Planner and Live GPS Tracking.
Map tile layer MUST be dark themed (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter or similar).
Build the Run History Dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid pattern: tight gaps, dense data, high contrast metrics.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do NOT use soft shadows (Neumorphism) everywhere; prefer sharp 1px borders and flat surfaces for the 'Tactical Minimalism' athletic look.
Build a Run Detail View with a replayable map, splits table, and elevation chart (using Recharts).
Metric values MUST use massive typography (text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter) with small uppercase labels (text-xs tracking-[0.2em]).
